# Public Folder

Place your background image here!

**Recommended file name:** `background.jpg` or `background.png`

After placing your image, update the CSS in `src/styles.css` to reference it.

Example:
- If you name it `background.jpg`, use: `background-image: url('/background.jpg');`
- If you name it `bg.png`, use: `background-image: url('/bg.png');`
